# Marketing Skills for AI Agents

> A library of 40 AI agent skills for marketing tasks — conversion optimization, SEO, AEO, copywriting, growth engineering, email, paid ads, analytics, and more. Built for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any agent supporting the Agent Skills spec.

By Corey Haines (https://corey.co). MIT license. GitHub: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills

## Skills

Skills install to `.agents/skills/` and give AI agents specialized marketing knowledge and workflows.

- [product-marketing-context](skills/product-marketing-context/SKILL.md): Foundation skill — creates the shared product/audience context that all other skills read first
- [page-cro](skills/page-cro/SKILL.md): Optimize any marketing page for conversions — homepage, landing pages, pricing
- [signup-flow-cro](skills/signup-flow-cro/SKILL.md): Optimize signup, registration, and trial activation flows
- [onboarding-cro](skills/onboarding-cro/SKILL.md): Improve post-signup onboarding and user activation
- [form-cro](skills/form-cro/SKILL.md): Optimize lead capture and contact forms
- [popup-cro](skills/popup-cro/SKILL.md): Create and optimize popups, modals, and overlays
- [paywall-upgrade-cro](skills/paywall-upgrade-cro/SKILL.md): Optimize in-app paywalls and upgrade moments
- [copywriting](skills/copywriting/SKILL.md): Write and improve marketing copy for any page
- [copy-editing](skills/copy-editing/SKILL.md): Edit and polish existing marketing copy
- [cold-email](skills/cold-email/SKILL.md): Write B2B cold emails and follow-up sequences
- [email-sequence](skills/email-sequence/SKILL.md): Create automated email sequences and lifecycle flows
- [social-content](skills/social-content/SKILL.md): Create and optimize social media content
- [seo-audit](skills/seo-audit/SKILL.md): Audit technical and on-page SEO issues
- [ai-seo](skills/ai-seo/SKILL.md): Optimize content for AI search (AEO, GEO, LLMO, AI Overviews)
- [programmatic-seo](skills/programmatic-seo/SKILL.md): Build SEO pages at scale with templates and data
- [site-architecture](skills/site-architecture/SKILL.md): Plan page hierarchy, navigation, and URL structure
- [competitor-alternatives](skills/competitor-alternatives/SKILL.md): Build comparison and alternative pages for SEO
- [schema-markup](skills/schema-markup/SKILL.md): Implement structured data and JSON-LD
- [technical-seo](skills/technical-seo/SKILL.md): Implement Core Web Vitals, crawl budget, hreflang, site speed
- [link-building](skills/link-building/SKILL.md): Build high-quality backlinks and domain authority
- [content-strategy](skills/content-strategy/SKILL.md): Plan content calendars, topic pillars, and pillar pages
- [paid-ads](skills/paid-ads/SKILL.md): Run paid campaigns on Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok
- [ad-creative](skills/ad-creative/SKILL.md): Generate and iterate ad creative at scale
- [analytics-tracking](skills/analytics-tracking/SKILL.md): Set up GA4, event tracking, and GTM
- [ab-test-setup](skills/ab-test-setup/SKILL.md): Design and implement A/B tests
- [churn-prevention](skills/churn-prevention/SKILL.md): Reduce churn with cancel flows, save offers, dunning
- [referral-program](skills/referral-program/SKILL.md): Build referral and affiliate programs
- [free-tool-strategy](skills/free-tool-strategy/SKILL.md): Build free tools for lead generation and SEO
- [product-led-growth](skills/product-led-growth/SKILL.md): Design PLG motion — freemium, trials, viral loops
- [community-led-growth](skills/community-led-growth/SKILL.md): Build marketing communities (Discord, Slack, Reddit)
- [newsletter-growth](skills/newsletter-growth/SKILL.md): Grow email newsletters and subscriber lists
- [video-seo](skills/video-seo/SKILL.md): Optimize YouTube and video content for search
- [influencer-marketing](skills/influencer-marketing/SKILL.md): Run influencer and creator marketing campaigns
- [demand-generation](skills/demand-generation/SKILL.md): B2B demand generation strategy and execution
- [marketing-ideas](skills/marketing-ideas/SKILL.md): 140 SaaS marketing ideas and growth tactics
- [marketing-psychology](skills/marketing-psychology/SKILL.md): Apply behavioral science and psychology to marketing
- [launch-strategy](skills/launch-strategy/SKILL.md): Plan product launches and feature announcements
- [pricing-strategy](skills/pricing-strategy/SKILL.md): Develop pricing, packaging, and monetization strategy
- [revops](skills/revops/SKILL.md): Revenue operations, lead scoring, routing, CRM automation
- [sales-enablement](skills/sales-enablement/SKILL.md): Create sales decks, one-pagers, and objection docs

## Tools

65 zero-dependency Node.js CLI tools + 72 integration guides for marketing platforms.

- [Tools Registry](tools/REGISTRY.md): Full index of all tools with API, MCP, CLI, and SDK availability

## Installation

```bash
npx skills add coreyhaines31/marketingskills
```

Or via Claude Code plugin:
```bash
/plugin marketplace add coreyhaines31/marketingskills
/plugin install marketing-skills
```

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Full expanded content index for LLMs
